qa_pair.question: In the fixed Brain Hub demo recorded on 2026-07-17, find the low-confidence claim about transcript compatibility, then follow the assertion that replaces it. Return the replacement node title exactly.
Start from the Brain Hub product workstream in the fixed demo, stay within two hops, and identify the inferred claim connected through the hybrid-search topic. Return the claim title exactly.
Inspect the fixed demo's local workspace and count only outgoing HAS_RUN assertions whose target is a Run node. Return one integer.
Find the Agent adapters task in the fixed demo and trace the incoming MODIFIES assertion. Return the source run title exactly.

From the Temporal knowledge graph topic in the fixed demo, inspect its dependency decisions and choose the one whose evidence says analysis stays server-side rather than rendering in the browser. Return its title exactly.
Find the ambiguous transcript-schema claim and the supported-hooks decision in the fixed demo. What is the uppercase relation on the directed assertion from the claim to the decision?
Expand the Codex implementation run in the fixed demo and count its outgoing PRODUCED assertions to Artifact nodes. Return one integer.
Trace the assertion from Semble hybrid search to the claim about preventing drift in the fixed demo. Return its confidence class exactly as uppercase text.
Find the actor titled Brain Hub owner in the fixed demo, follow the outgoing PARTICIPATES_IN assertion, and return the target workstream title exactly.
Within two hops of Temporal knowledge graph in the fixed demo, find the decision whose evidence identifies the canonical local WAL event/projection store. Return the node title exactly.
